backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a landing page backend with contact form submission (public), admin-only contact request retrieval, and user profile CRUD with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the new-qro-main.jpeg image was saved as a static asset and used as the HeroSection background with object-fit cover.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, styling tokens, and key implementation details.
frontend/.ic-assets.json: Internet Computer asset configuration that ensures the .well-known directory is not ignored during deployment.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Google Fonts preconnect for Inter and Playfair Display, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/.well-known/ic-domains: Internet Computer custom domain file registering myplaceatqueretaro.com and www.myplaceatqueretaro.com.
frontend/public/robots.txt: SEO-friendly robots.txt allowing all major crawlers (Googlebot, Bingbot, PerplexityBot, and all others) full site access.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page landing layout by composing Header, Hero, Features, About, Contact, ScheduleConsultation, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a business description, three trust indicators (36+ years, 500+ clients/year, 98% satisfaction), and an about-us-image.jpg in a two-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Native HTML form that submits name, email, phone, and message fields directly to Formspree without custom state management.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section combining the ContactForm with business contact details (phone, email, location), social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube), and business hours, all in a two-column layout.
Renders a 'Why Choose Us' section with four feature cards (Premium Accommodations, Prime Locations, Trusted Service, Personalized Experience) and a YouTube link button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, legal links, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a background image, headline, subtitle, and CTA buttons that scroll to the contact and features sections.
frontend/src/components/LandingHeader.ts: Renders a fixed navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Book' CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with scroll-based styling.
frontend/src/components/ScheduleConsulta: Renders a consultation scheduling section that lazily loads and displays an inline Calendly booking widget when the user clicks the 'Book' button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitContactReque: File is empty with no content.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm terracotta/earth-tone design system, with both light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Exports a utility function that smoothly scrolls to a page section by ID, accounting for the header height as an offset.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps OKLCH CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends the theme with custom fonts, shadows, animations, and responsive breakpoints, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, summary, existing features, and image requirements; records that a user-provided background image (new-qro-main.jpeg) has been applied to the HeroSection component.
